inputs.text: Hyperrealistic sports photograph of the Korean soccer team celebrating on the pitch immediately after winning their World Cup match against the Czech Republic. The focus is tight on a key player hoisting a trophy or flag, with teammates gathered around them in a joyful huddle. Clear detail on jerseys, cleats, and facial expressions of pure victory. Bright stadium floodlights, bokeh effect from the stands, ultra-detailed, taken by a professional sports photographer.
